fields.title: Road Resurfacing & Line Marking
fields.description: Full resurfacing of the A64 corridor section using 40% recycled asphalt aggregate. Includes thermoplastic line marking with high retro-reflectivity for safety.

fields.title: Solar Panel Supply & Install
fields.description: Supply and installation of monocrystalline solar panels for 2km of corridor roofing. Must include micro-inverters and smart grid tie-in capabilities.

fields.title: Electrical Grid Integration Works
fields.description: High-voltage cabling and substation upgrades to handle solar output. Works include trenching and connection to the local distribution network operator (DNO).

fields.title: Waterproofing Layer Application
fields.description: Application of root-resistant waterproofing membrane to Grade II listed roof structure. Must offer 25-year guarantee and compatibility with green roof substrate.

fields.title: Native Wildflower Plug Planting
fields.description: Supply and planting of 5,000 native provenance wildflower plugs. Species mix must support local pollinators (bees/butterflies) identified in the BAP.

fields.title: Limestone Wall Conservation
fields.description: Specialist masonry repairs to historic limestone walls using traditional lime mortar. Contractors must be heritage accredited.

fields.title: Biodiversity Habitat Installation
fields.description: Fabrication and installation of 50 bat boxes and 30 swift bricks into existing structures. Includes ecological clerk of works supervision.

fields.title: Modular Timber Frame Supply
fields.description: Off-site fabrication of structural timber panels for eco-classroom. Timber must be FSC/PEFC certified and delivered for rapid assembly.

fields.title: Air Source Heat Pump System
fields.description: Installation of 12kW ASHP system including underfloor heating manifold and commissioning. Must meet MCS standards.

fields.title: Smart Street Lighting (Solar LED)
fields.description: Supply of 40 standalone solar-powered LED streetlights with motion-dimming sensors and IoT remote monitoring capability.

fields.title: Permeable Paving Installation
fields.description: Resurfacing of tram stop walkways with resin-bound permeable aggregate to improve SUDS performance.

fields.title: Tree Planting (Whips & Standards)
fields.description: Planting of 1,500 native saplings (whips) and 50 semi-mature standards. Includes rabbit guards, staking, and 2-year maintenance watering.

fields.title: Pond Excavation & Lining
fields.description: Excavation of 3 wildlife ponds with varied depth profiles. Installation of clay liner and aquatic marginal planting shelves.

fields.title: Gabion Basket Wall Construction
fields.description: Installation of 200m of gabion baskets filled with locally sourced limestone. Includes geo-textile backing and toe reinforcement.

fields.title: District Heating Pipe Laying
fields.description: Trenching and installation of pre-insulated twin pipes for district heating network. High-precision welding and x-ray testing required.

fields.title: EV Rapid Chargers (50kW+)
fields.description: Supply and commissioning of 20 DC rapid charging units. Must support contactless payment and OCRP protocols.

fields.title: Glazing Replacement Works
fields.description: Removal of existing single-pane windows and installation of triple-glazed units. Includes making good of internal reveals and sills.

fields.title: Cycle Lane Surfacing (Coloured)
fields.description: Laying of high-friction blue surfacing for segregated cycle lane. Must adhere to LTN 1/20 design standards.

fields.title: Asphalt Removal & Disposal
fields.description: Break out and removal of playground asphalt. Disposal must be via certified recycling facility (crushing for re-use).

fields.title: Heritage Slate Roofing
fields.description: Re-roofing using reclaimed Welsh slate. Includes lead flashing renewal and timber batten replacement.
